description_long: This is a medium-sized spoon with a broad, oval-shaped bowl made of a dark, matte metal. The handle is straight, rectangular, and appears to be crafted from polished wood, featuring visible grain patterns and two metallic rivets securing the metal to the wood. The transition between the handle and the bowl is smooth, with the metal extending slightly into the handle for reinforcement. The spoon's bowl is deep enough for scooping liquids or semi-solids, making it suitable for both eating and serving. The wood handle provides a comfortable grip and a warm contrast to the cool, dark metal of the bowl. The overall design is utilitarian yet stylish, blending traditional materials with a modern aesthetic.
description: A spoon with a dark metal bowl and a polished wooden handle, secured by two rivets. The design is both functional and visually appealing, with a smooth transition between materials.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thin profile of the spoon and the straight wooden handle.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the broad, oval-shaped metal bowl and the full width of the wooden handle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and the length of the handle.
description_view_3: Back view displaying the curvature of the bowl and the alignment of the handle rivets.
attribute_orientation: bowl facing upward, handle extending downward
attribute_contextual_placement: resting flat on a surface or nested with other utensils
attribute_proximity_to_other_objects: often placed next to forks and knives or stacked with similar spoons
